api-gateway.label: API Gateway
api-gateway.description: Top-level entry point. Routes requests to services. Sits above all services.

service.label: Service
service.description: Self-contained business domain service. Stacked vertically. Owns its logic, models, and data access.

database.label: Database
database.description: On-device persistence layer. Foundation at the bottom. Services read/write here.

external-api.label: External API
external-api.description: Third-party or remote service reached out to horizontally from a service.

sync-service.label: Sync Service
sync-service.description: Background fetch / cron updater. Reaches out horizontally to external APIs, writes down to database.

model.label: Domain Model
model.description: Shared data entity. Sendable struct. Flows between services and database.
